creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net
text:
Control widgets are so lightly colored that they appear as if they are greyed-out (eg; inactive), except for the Eject and "current track" widgets. Some scheme change would be good to make all of the widgets appear "more colorful" so
they won't be mistaken for not working.

For some reason playback stops after track #2 (ie; entire "album" is not automatically played any more).
